Maharashtra Education Service, Group-B (Administration) from the cadre
Branch) in the cadre of Deputy Academician and similar.
With regard to the grant of a revised posting by promotion.
Government of Maharashtra
Department of School Education and Sports
GOVERNMENT ORDER NUMBER: NISOCIO 3625 / E-1731926 / PRASH-2
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk,
Mantralaya, Mumbai - 400032
Date: July 1, 2026
Read-
Government Order No. Nisuchi 3625 / E-1538773 / PRASH-2, dated 24.04.2026.
Government Orders -
Read about the category of "Extension Officer" in the District Technical Service under the Government Order here.
Employees in the rank of Deputy Academician and equivalent in Maharashtra Education Service Group-B (Administrative Branch) (Salary)
Pay Rs. S-17: 47600-151100) Net temporary promotion subject to prescribed conditions
has been provided. However, the rank of the following officer has been revised, with partial changes in his / her rank:
The position is as shown in the table below in Column No. There are 4 vacancies.
The Commissioner (Education), Pune, in accordance with this order, appointed the officer of the revised rank within the prescribed period.
Make sure you join the given position and submit a report to the government.
Do it.

Deputy Education Officer, Education Officer (Medium) G.P. Beed
